action.reasoning: Observation: current best is 0.1835 from the 2-epoch Sketch CLIP checkpoint; the 3-epoch checkpoint is nearly tied at 0.1833, and prediction currently uses a single center-crop view. Analysis: averaging two adjacent checkpoints and adding a mild full-image resize view may provide a low-risk inference-side gain without more training; if it underperforms, the recorded best remains available and can be restored. Decision: update predict.py to support ensemble checkpoint manifests and optional two-view TTA, create an ensemble manifest for the 2e and 3e checkpoints, and submit it for evaluation.
